content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach makes multiple visible, specific, and timely reads. In turn 6, the coach names the pattern explicitly — 'Each time I get close, another wall appears' — a pattern-level read of the wall-building/aggressive-victim stance that directly shifts the conversation. In turn 8, the coach catches the linguistic/somatic signal of the laugh in turn 7 and names it specifically ('I notice the laugh just now — when I asked what you're scared of feeling'), rather than letting the deflection pass. Reads precede questions throughout: the coach names what they're noticing, then inquires into it. The coach also tracks what's underneath the content (fear of a feeling) rather than engaging the content-level debate about whether the constraints are real. This avoids the trap of validating the trap or arguing with it. The reads are timely — they land in the moment the client is deflecting, not after.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Generic acknowledgment ('heavy thing to carry') — surface mood read but not specifically AoA. Moves to a question quickly."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "No read; goes straight to a question about action. Misses an opportunity to name the resignation in the client's voice."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Strong pattern-level read named explicitly: 'Each time I get close, another wall appears.' Names the wall-building/aggressive-victim stance and grounds the question in the observation."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the laugh as a tell — names the specific somatic/linguistic signal in real time and inquires into it. Distinguishes said from shown."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "No new read but holds the space well; lets the possibility land."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Minimal — invites sitting with it. No explicit read but stays with the moment."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Stays with the felt material without naming a new read; appropriate given the client is now in contact."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["fight-or-roll-over-binary", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "i-dont-buy-your-story", "trappedness-feeling"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["fear-triangle", "aggressive-victim-stance"],
  "notes": "Pattern read in turn 6 is the pivotal moment — names the trap-building without colluding or debating constraints. The laugh-catch in turn 8 is a textbook AoA read of the linguistic caveat / deflection signal."
}
